title: lucilia acutifolia var. microphylla
intro: Lucilia acutifolia var. microphylla, also known as Lucilia or Dwarf Lucilia, is a flowering plant species in the daisy family (Asteraceae). The plant is traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and expectorant properties, making it effective in treating respiratory issues, such as coughs and bronchitis. The health benefits of Lucilia acutifolia var. microphylla include its ability to soothe and calm the respiratory system, reduce fever, and alleviate symptoms of colds and flu. Herbal preparations of Lucilia acutifolia var. microphylla include teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties and promote overall well-being.
